Class TenantBaseResource<T extends BaseID<Integer>>

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.rest.DailyLimitUpdCreateLogger<T>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreate<T>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreateResource<T>
grafiosch.rest.TenantBaseResource<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
TenantResource, TenantResource
public abstract class TenantBaseResource<T extends BaseID<Integer>> extends UpdateCreateResource<T>

      @GetMapping(value="/accessible", produces="application/json") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<TenantAccessInfo>> getAccessibleTenants()

    • switchTenant

      @PostMapping(value="/switchto/{idTargetTenant}", produces="application/json") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,String>> switchTenant(@PathVariable Integer idTargetTenant)

    • resolveAppSpecificSwitchTargetLevel

      protected TenantAccessLevel resolveAppSpecificSwitchTargetLevel(User user, Integer homeIdTenant, Integer idTarget)
      Hook for application-specific switch targets beyond the user's home tenant and explicit TenantAccess grants. The default forbids any other target. GrafioschTrader overrides this to allow switching into a simulation tenant that is a child of the user's home tenant.
      Parameters:
      user - the current user
      homeIdTenant - the user's persisted home tenant
      idTarget - the tenant the user wants to switch to
      Returns:
      the access level to grant on the target, or null to forbid the switch

    • createClient

      @PostMapping(value="/createclient", produces="application/json") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> createClient(@Valid @RequestBody @Valid CreateClientRequest request) throws jakarta.mail.MessagingException
      Throws:
      jakarta.mail.MessagingException

      @DeleteMapping(value="/client/{idTenant}", produces="application/json") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteManagedClient(@PathVariable Integer idTenant) throws Exception
      Throws:
      Exception

      @PostMapping(value="/share", produces="application/json") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> shareReadAccess(@Valid @RequestBody @Valid ShareReadAccessRequest request) throws jakarta.mail.MessagingException
      Throws:
      jakarta.mail.MessagingException

      @GetMapping(value="/share/recipient-status", produces="application/json") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ShareRecipientStatusResponse> getShareRecipientStatus(@RequestParam String email)

      @GetMapping(value="/shares", produces="application/json") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<SharedViewerInfo>> getSharedViewers()

    • revokeShare

      @DeleteMapping(value="/share/{idUser}", produces="application/json") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> revokeShare(@PathVariable Integer idUser)

    • createManagedClientTenant

      protected abstract Integer createManagedClientTenant(String tenantName, User advisor)
      Creates and persists the concrete tenant for a managed client and returns its id. The concrete tenant type and its currency are application-specific (the library only knows the TenantBase mapped superclass), so the application supplies the implementation (typically using the advisor's own tenant currency).
      Parameters:
      tenantName - the name for the new tenant
      advisor - the advisor creating the client
      Returns:
      the id of the newly created tenant

    • getManagedTenantName

      protected abstract String getManagedTenantName(Integer idTenant)
      Returns the display name of a tenant by id, or null if it does not exist. The application supplies this because the concrete tenant repository is application-specific.
      Parameters:
      idTenant - the tenant id
      Returns:
      the tenant name, or null
